description: Style NoteHitting all the season's fashion notes right, this pair of sandals from catwalk is a closet essential that'll go with all your summer favourites. You can wear this to snazz up a simple look, but don't forget to style them with tonal accessories!Product DetailsPointy toed sandal with a velveteen toe box with cut-outsLightly padded heel patchTough heel with velvet overlayTPU outsole plastic heel capHeel: 3.5"Material and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
